Bus Timings

X94 Bus Schedule Gold Souq to Dubai Investment Park

February 2, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

As part of Dubai’s well-organized public transport network, Bus X94 plays a crucial role in connecting the bustling city center with industrial and residential areas. This route ensures smooth travel for commuters heading to work, shopping destinations, or residential communities.

Operational Details

Bus X94 operates frequently to cater to both early and late commuters, ensuring a reliable transport option throughout the day.

From Gold Souq From Dubai Investment Park
06:30 07:37
06:50 07:59
07:10 08:22

Download PDF Bus X94

Bus X94 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website, or simply follow this link for X94 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing and Payment: Tickets for Bus X94 can be conveniently purchased using Dubai’s Nol card, the city’s standard cashless payment system for public transportation. The fare for this route, from Al Ghubaiba Station to Dubai Investment Park, is 25 AED. For topping up your Nol card or checking specific fare details, passengers can visit any RTA service center or use the vending machines located throughout the city.

Route Overview

Bus X94 covers several key stops, starting from the historic Gold Souq Bus Station and extending all the way to Dubai Investment Park.

Key Stops Include:

  1. Gold Souq Bus Station The starting point, a vibrant hub for commerce and tourism.

  2. Naif, Intersection A key stop in the heart of old Dubai, connecting bustling markets and residential areas.

  3. Al Nakhal A central stop providing access to various parts of the city.

4.

  1. Maktoum Road A vital road in the financial district, connecting business and commercial areas.

  2. Umm Hurair, Road A significant stop along a major route in Dubai.

  3. Al Jafiliya Bus Station · 3 A key transit hub, offering connections to other routes.

8.

  1. Landmark Group A major retail and business stop.

  2. Al Khaleej Al Madina Supermarket A stop providing access to a local retail center.

  3. Nuzul Labour Accommodation Serving residents in the labor accommodation area.

  4. Jebel Ali, Parco Hypermarket A key stop for shoppers in the Jebel Ali area.

  5. Jebel Ali Industrial Area, Qaser Al Kabayel Center A hub for industrial activity and workers.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Jebel Ali Industrial Area 11 Another important stop for workers in the industrial zone.

  2. Amssar Wood Manufacturing A stop near a major manufacturing center.

  3. Falcon Chemicals Serving the industrial workforce.

  4. Port Saeed Transport Company A stop associated with transportation and logistics services.

  5. Shoba Contracting Labour Camp A stop for those working in the labor camp.

  6. Dubai Contracting Labour Camp Another major stop serving workers in this area.

  7. Danata (Dubai Investment Park) The final destination, an important industrial and business hub in Dubai.

Accessibility Features

These include low-floor buses for easy boarding, designated seating areas, and clear audio-visual announcements to assist those with hearing or visual impairments.

Connectivity and Intersections

Additionally, its well-planned route covers key residential, commercial, and industrial areas, making it a convenient option for both daily commuters and visitors.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Passengers traveling on Bus X94 will have access to several key attractions and landmarks:

  • Gold Souq

  • Union Metro Station
  • Jebel Ali Free Zone
  • Grand Hypermarket

Journey Experience

A trip on the X94 bus from Gold Souq to Dubai Investment Park offers a long but captivating journey through diverse parts of Dubai. As the bus moves further, it passes through major commercial hubs and key residential areas, offering a glimpse of both modern skyscrapers and traditional communities.

This route highlights Dubai’s blend of tradition and modernity, making it an interesting ride for both commuters and visitors.

Tips and Travel Advice

To maximize your experience on Bus X94, try traveling during off-peak hours to avoid crowds. Download the RTA app for real-time updates on schedules and routes. Be sure to keep your Nol card topped up and ready for use, and always be mindful of your belongings while traveling.

Bus X94 is an integral part of Dubai’s public transport network, offering efficient and convenient service between the bustling Gold Souq and the industrial hub of Dubai Investment Park.

For further details and updates, be sure to check the Dubai Roads and Transport Authority’s official resources. With its seamless connections to other transit options, Bus X94 ensures easy navigation across the city for both locals and tourists. To explore the full network of Dubai buses, refer to the complete guide on Dubai’s bus routes.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
